Full_Review: Nothing Our entire stay was a pleasure   The entire staff was extremely friendly and helpful Our requests were responded to in a very timely manner Everything was perfect from the time we checked in until the time we checked out We will stay at Doubletree again and will definitely recommend it to anyone traveling to London
The neighborhood isn t very homey or lively It s like staying at Wall Street but with less views   The hotel itself is comfy and beautiful It s a secret surprise

The room needed a lot of work There were stains on the carpet dents on the skirting boards and stains in the shower Not what I expected for the price I paid I have stayed in many Hilton Hotels previously and this bedroom was definitely at the bottom of them all The Hotel itself was nice and staff were lovely   The hotel was a perfect location
rooms and halls are a bit dated and the computer monitor that doubles as a tv was to small to view from the bed comfortably   nice location not far from Big Ben

Thee was no fridge in the room and we were not informed of this beforehand Room was somewhat noisy as work thing place outside Handle on window was loose and nearly came away Having stayed several times at the Doubletree at Tower Hill I felt this stay was not as enjoyable   Position cleanliness value

Bath would have been good in the room after doing marathon but only available if I upgraded to executive rooms for an extra 150 per night   Staff were excellent during my stay Room was clean and bed was comfortable Good location for London marathon i e 10 minute walk to Pimlico station and then one stop to Victoria where I was able to get train to Black Heath About 20 minute walk back from Mall so ideal for walking off after race

I mentioned to front desk that our bathroom sink leaked onto the floor didn t spoil our stay but is a potentially serious problem if not fixed Also and this is common to ALL hotels there s never enough milk supplied for the in room tea   Very comfortable rooms Helpful when supplying shower facilities after our check out time for my brother who had run the London Marathon There were lots of other marathoners staying there and a similar facility was extended to them too

Not as central as I originally thought it was however it was easy to get to and from   Beautiful reception area restaurant and decor Rooms were clean comfortable and spacious The children loved the cookies
It s a bit difficult for drivers to get to the entrance of the hotel as plenty of building works are carrying on outside of the hotel   Location is quiet and very close to the Westminster landmarks

Hot Breakfast hot Beverages was cool to lukewarm Mentioned it to a waiter who reported this to his superior Next morning he ensured that my hot chocolate was hot Hot breakfast slightly warmer however nobody likes lukewarm breakfast with soggy hash browns   I requested an earlier check in as came on a long haul flight from Australia It was a relief that there was a room available on my arrival to the hotel Very much appreciated

There was a lot of construction work around so the views were not great however watching the cranes was quite interesting Having to close the curtains so the workmen could not see in was not great although some people might pay extra for that   The staff were really helpful as well as friendly and the room facilities were excellent although I do miss a bath The Tate Britain was 5 minutes away which was great and Pimlico station was really close so I could not ask for more

Wasn t keen on the TV which is an Apple Mac I would rather have a widescreen TV Breakfast expensive we went to the regency cafe which cost 10 for the two of us   Hot cookies on arrival nice touch and yummy Bed very comfortable all staff friendly and helpful

Breakfast buffet good staff service excellent However overall the food was only just warm on the hot buffet service Some drinks tepid and had to be returned  Staff were attentive and helpful we were a party of 2 adults and 4 children Housekeeping services of a good standard Breakfast service good The staff group overall are the jewel in the crown

Nothing Resisting you amazing cookies on welcome   Consistency with doubletree hotels The gym was fabulous The view makes going to the gym that bit more enjoyable The signs do need updating to state it s on the 14th floor not the 4th though

We couldn t fault anything to be honest As it was just what we wanted and exspected will defiantly use again  Quite clean easy to find staff very friendly Location was fine very near London eye and Big Ben which we found great

The bathrooms looking a little sad and need some maintenance Otherwise very satisfied   Excellent choice of breakfast Helpful and friendly staff Disappointed that the restaurant wasn t open on Sunday evening After a long day walking we didn t want to go out to eat

Unfortunately the TV service wasn t working during our stay however we were very rarely in the room but it would have been nice to relax watching TV after a long day walking in London   Loved receiving a warm cookie to sit and eat with a cup of tea after travelling

The 2 beds were very close together my friend snores a lot and room was quite small for 2 people who are not a couple Otherwise pillows were nice and soft   The breakfast was delightful as was the food in restaurant Staff were so friendly and helpful to us Hotel was so close to all the sights and chemists and pubs etc

Tv didn t work in room Due to Apple laptop ridiculous why not have just a simple to use TV it was only for the grandson to watch a bit of TV told reception who said they would see to it but they didn t Annoyed me that   Breakfasts

Construction outside my window but not deal breaker just bad timing   Buffet breakfast was perfect for a long day of sightseeing Close to Salisbury store for cheap complete meals Away from loud big ben but short 1mi walk to big ben and Westminster Abbey Offers discounts to bar if no daily housekeeping

No restaurants etc in the immediate area Quiet in the evening with few people on the streets feels a bit lonely walking about after dark Area surrounding hotel mainly building works for new apartments and offices   Room breakfast helpful and friendly staff Taxis waiting outside for customers

The staff were friendly and very helpful Our first night was perfect and very close to St Thomas hospital My partner had to stay for a second night as I went in for an operation and they kept me in overnight The car parking staff at the front desk were very helpful and made parking the car worry free We felt welcome and the staff were exceptional

Not all toiletries were replaced after the first day I had to call the front desk twice an hour apart to receive the needed toiletries Though there is a workout room it should not be called a gym very tiny space claustrophobic   The breakfast was excellent but please do not sit a single adult professional next to families with children first thing in the morning
No smoking area outside   Excellent service nothing was too much trouble Lovely room comfy beds Mac computer a very nice touch Great breakfast and the coffee came quickly on both days

Thick curtains but wouldn t close correctly so not really blackout Room was too light in the morning Also no bath but that isn t an issue for most travellers   We had breakfast in bed for just a 5 tray charge and free cookies at the front desk V helpful staff We had early checkin to a well proportioned modern clean room and got late checkout all at no extra charge Highly recommended

I can t think of anything except something really minor They were a little miserly with their milk allowance for the complimentary tea coffee in our room Even after I requested more milk lol Like I said a minor complaint   Beds were comfy The breakfast was good Staff were friendly and efficient Location was central Rooms were spacious compared with other Central London hotels Shower was lovely and powerful
Bed a little uncomfy and fan in room was quite noisy but not a major problem  Convenient location for what we needed Very friendly staff Nice simple clean room

Excellent breakfast Room well appointed free bottled water was a nice touch along with freshly baked cookies on arrival Quick check in and out Comfy bed and pillows Good tv computer and free Wi Fi Definitely will stay again

The open WiFi meant my device wouldn t allow me to use it because it was deemed unsafe I know there is a computer in the room so it s a bit lazy to expect to be able to sit on bed etc etc but would prefer secure access   It wasn t not noisy at all we were able to control temperature and reception service on arrival superb
Good location in a quiet area 10 15 minute walk to nearest tube stations which are Pimlico and Westminster Queen room was good size and lovely and quiet
Bathrooms were small with no outlets for hairdryer Hot water switched to cool during short shower time   Rooms and bed comfy Staff was very helpful and polite

nothing could have been better   The chocolate chip cookies on reception were scrumptious executive lounge brilliant food to die for Rooms crisp and fresh lots of facilities We were treated like kings because my son had his 12th birthday there the staff gave him a Hilton teddy and a tin of cookies and we were upgraded Would definitely recommend this hotel to anyone

That I messaged the hotel via booking com about the purpose of our trip my partners 40th and if they could do anything extra special which I was willing to pay extra for but unfortunately I did not get a reply
Thought there was no tea coffee making facilities as hidden in a draw so only realised on the 2nd day of our stay Needs to be made more clear   The bed was soooo comfy and the room clean and spacious

The room facilities were clean but s little tired   The warm cookie on arrival was a nice touch Staff at reception were excellent we left our case as we were early All of the catering and bar staff were lovely couldn t do enough to help Breakfast was lovely

They never said about the amount of building work right out side the window also they have charged me twice for a one night stay called them Monday the lady I spoke to said the person whom deals with this is not here today I will ask him to call you Tomoz it is now Wednesday afternoon no call no email no refund from a high end established company this is the last thing I expected and the total lack of customer service is terrible I will be in touch with a solicitor first thing Thursday if no call or refund in my bank oh and the 50 deposit that wasn t stated until check in also still no been refunded and they said will be straight back into my account this has ruined my whole experience of London and the Hilton chain avoid at all costs or u will be out of pocket and ignored   Was very nice under first impression very easy check in very nice room good amount of space

Room cold even with heating turned up No television reception staff said there was a computer instead but that it was unable to pick up T V signals Couldn t watch catch up or film as the anti virus software wouldn t allow it Tea coffee etc in short supply in room not topped up and made to feel uncomfortable when we asked for some Power cut on sunday pm can t be helped but I would have thought a hotel of this size would have a generator for back up I walk with a stick and struggled to get up the stairs to 6th floor with the lifts not working   Clean the only good thing about it

Ignored special request for river view room instead overlooking building works all week end which we were not advised about Exec lounge facilities very poor better to have breakfast in main restaurant No TV in bed room only a small Apple Mac screen Cleaner knocked on door 3 times early on Sunday morning even though we did not need to check out till 12 Very modern and lacking in any character Think I would have been better in so many of the other hotels we had looked at

Being told they were fully booked and being assigned a different room When I had drive for over 6 hours that day Having no bath in the room Construction work takin place outside which woke us up early the following morning  The hotel was clean and the food was lovely
The room was small and just had a shower instead of a bath The views were not good either   Hotel very average for the prices they charge We had to wait to be sited for breakfast and was packed

There was nothing my kid or I didn t like at the hotel   Very helpful and pleasant reception staff Our trip to London was a birthday present for my daughter so the staff had the room decorated with balloons and put some nice presents for my kid The location of the hotel seems to be ideal All the major London sights are reachable by foot If you happen to fly via Gatwick Victoria station with its Gatwick Express is within a walking distance from the hotel Notwithstanding its central location the hotel is very quiet even for such a sensitive to noise person as I A separate praise goes to breakfasts The breakfasts are extremely good

All was very good no dislikes at all  Warm cookie on arrival a lovely touch breakfast had plenty of variety and all nice and fresh Forgot to ask for synthetic pillows as allergic to feathers and this was dealt with swiftly and without fuss by reception and housekeeping staff

Executive Lounge was an upsell from Front Desk but having enjoyed Lounges elsewhere this was a real let down with only powdered coffee few cold drinks no alcohol and nuts in a bowl Don t bother Nearest Tube stations feel far on foot and through traffic Will need a taxi to get there and arrive unruffled Queen executive room anywhere else would be big but in London felt small Steep bar tariff so go easy or go to local places for evening drinks   Good location central to Westminster attractions breakfasts good views across the Thames to the South Bank
The bed was extremely uncomfortable So much so we had to change hotels after 2 nights The lack of tv in the room was annoying The iMac computer is not a good replacement for a regular TV

There are long queues at breakfast when you get there around 9 am It would be better if the buffet could be reached from two sides or if there were two or three buffets so that not everyone has to line up for the same table For being a sustainable hotel there are some things that could be improved like no plastic cups in the gym The location is good but no tube station is really close Unfortunately there are high buildings next to the hotel that disturb the view to the river We had a room with a view to a construction site   The staff was really kind and nice always smiling The hotel has everything we need in good quality Breakfast tasted delicious Location is close to the river next to Westminster abbey and House of Parliament
Breakfast was buffet style with plenty of choice and the staff are very attentive The Thames is only a very short walk away which then leads you to lots of attractions and Tube Stations

We re celebrating an anniversary and had a card left in Room congratulating us and also received a drinks voucher each for a free drink of our choice from the bar this was a lovely touch friendly staff
Shower only and small bathroom for 4 star hotel   Central location Welcoming and helpful staff Relaxing bar Comfortable and huge king size bed 12 00 midday checkout Sunday

I was very disappointed that with our view from our room as we took the advantage to upgrade to a King room with a city view when we arrived at our room all the view we got was a building site   The hotel staff are very friendly and the facilities of the hotel was great
Way too expensive Bathrooms are tiny Watching tv on a Mac is a bit rubbish tbh Never worth 159 per night 110 would be more like it  Clean and tidy

The prices in the bar were very very expensive The cost of a glass of wine was more than the cost of a bottle in most other places I can understand why most people went to the Pizza Express around the corner to eat and drink  Location

Shower water temperature kept changing almost got scalded Did not give new tea bags or milk during second day of stay poor house keeping   Very good breakfast excellent choice Power cut in room staff responded quickly to address problem Check in staff very helpful Liked applemacs in room

Where were the stairs Always had to use lifts which were very busy Very strange for such a big hotel Don t let it put you off though we could have asked the staff   Breakfast was excellent Great choice Staff very helpful Great stay

It s great having an apple computer but you can t watch TV and be on the computer at the same time   When I told the receptionist that we were celebrating my husbands 50th birthday she gave us access to the VIP lounge

The view was terrible as the building site view from the window was a bit much had to order the mini bar if you wanted it the room was very small for the money we paid only one chair for a double room   I didn t like anything about my stay here would not stay here again ever

Breakfast was busy and the tables were close together so we had little privacy but the amazing food and staff made up for this tiny dislike  Perfect location walked a mile to get to central tourist attractions if you don t want to walk there are always taxis waiting outside and staff were always on hand to assist We stayed on the 10th floor the view wasn t a spectacular London skyline view but pleasant Warm cookies a check in were a nice touch and very yummy

The only thing that I would have improved on was the mattress on the bed as I found it very hard   Where do I start the staff were excellent and friendly nothing was too much trouble We were able to check in a lot earlier than posted and check out later We had breakfast and the selection preparation and service was superb Everything was clean about the hotel Finally the location was brilliant for what we needed which was a weekend in London to go see a musical and see some sites Thank you
Expensive  Great location nice and quiet residential area clise tube stations inclufing direct connection to St Pancras and beautiful walking paths to the city center Very good quality restaurant

Hotel offers car parking but it is 30 per night so if your staying a few nights and drove into London this needs to be factored into the hotel stay   The location was brilliant Big Ben London eye river Thames shrek adventure and sea life centre all within walking distance The hotel is very modern with really friendly staff

We had to wait two hours fir our room to be ready even though we didn t arrive til 4 The reception supervisor was quite unhelpful when I went several times and only did something once my husband complained heavily   Room was lovely staff were very friendly with children especially

The meatballs were undercooked and the temperature of food at breakfast was in the danger zone Cold should be cold and hot hot   The location room and facilities were nice Staff were helpful and pleasant

Location is a little far away from the tube but that is not a major issue as I discovered that it was actually possible to walk to some of the key landmarks in London e g Westminster Abbey Trafalgar Square   Warm and helpful staff clean rooms sufficient amenities in the room e g toiletries kettle coffee and tea cookie was a nice welcome gesture

I could here running water all night and it took me ages to find where it was coming from I did not complain as I did not want the bother of changing rooms However after 3 restless nights I wish I had   The staff are very good and well trained They can t do enough to help
Distance to Tube Stations and also TV was via Mac which didn t have HD quality   Modern hotel with easy access and effortless stay Nice bar great location for Tate and sight seeing near the Thames

Lovely room handy restaurant on site very friendly staff Everything felt very new and clean it had that lovely hotel smell Comfy bed nice bathroom I couldn t totally turn off the air con noise which kept me awake but that s a minor issue given that everything else was faultless

The bed did hurt my back a bit the mattress was much harder than I am used to   Suprisingly quiet in the hotel could hardly hear any noise from outside And breakfast was brilliant so much choice and all delicious

Noise from the building site next door which we weren t made aware of when booking meant a very early start to the day   Full English breakfast was included and was very good huge selection and fresh Staff were very friendly and helpful and free welcome cookies were a nice touch

I was travelling with my teenage granddaughter The twin room was very small unbearably hot Even with air conditioning at coldest highest setting impossible to sleep Shower room uncomfortably tiny Corridors of hotel looked shabby paint scuffed The evening meal options were very limited to say the least This hotel apart from the staff does not deserve the name Hilton   Staff were superb They were too good for this hotel

A little far out from theatre district with 4 children but taxis readily available outside the hotel  Clean and value for money on a busy December weekend Warm cookies on check in concierge was very friendly

Ice machine info on hotel and what was where isn t very good I can use the apple which was fab btw but info wasnt there Same as reminder for checkout time   Lovely hotel close to New Year ceebrations Helpful staff but they were so busy that I tried calling and going to reception to find basic of where can I fill my NY ice bucket available in room Room was very clean and bed made up for my daughter which was lovely and comfy I will definitely book here again which says a lot

It is really a five star hotel Rooms are small There is no TV I stayed in executive room which comes along with a executive lounge The smallest lounge I have seen in my life Cramped with people and there was no room to sit Went three times there and finally gave up Horrible food No parking space Staff was rude to assist Simply told find a space somewhere putside the hotel on a street The so called Queen size bed is smallest I have seen in a 5 star hotel Very basic facilities Room looked like a hostel room Breakfast was served in a way that it gave me a feeling that I was being served in a flight Smallest glasses and plates possible Avoid this hotel at all cost Only word staff knew was WHAT please or excuse me were not in their dictionary   Location

We upgraded to executive suite with queen bed use of sky louge etc However not upgraded Double bed only basic room told sky lounge was closed NYE but later found out it was in fact open to watch fireworks Gutted   Location was fantadtic

We was allocated a room on 10th floor which was on executive floor but the view was poor looked directly at building site nothing else For the price paid it was rather poor but when we asked staff to move to another room they was so accomodating and moved us immediately  The staff were extremely polite and very friendly We had use of the executive lounge which was a lovely addition to our stay Room very clean Would highly recommend this hotel

There is some construction going on in the neighorhood but of course this isnt hotel s fault You hardly ever hear any construction noise and there is a decent alternate walking route available   Location was superb You can easily walk around to see all major attractions Hotel staff was super friendly and caring

Bed are not King liked states in description for executive rooms Springs broken in bed rude arrogant staff didn t help a nice man from guest see vices adventurous did Not worth money don t go there the worst

Booking com booked a room that could not accommodate our whole family luckily doubletree were able to move us to a bigger room   The staff were great apart from those in the cafe when we went for breakfast I did mention this when I checked out and the member of staff there was really keen to make up for our disappointment

We re not given correct room upon checkin Get rid of the Apple Mac computers in the rooms and put in LCD TV screens Also it is England wet and rain should be umbrellas in the rooms for guests to use   Outstanding breakfast the best I ve ever had in a hotel

The location was a bit away from the tube station Pimlico is a bit nearer than westminster About a 10 minute walk   The staff were lovely Breakfast was very good Room was brilliant and bed was comfy pillows were amazing The lovely man on the concierge desk gave us cookies all packaged up for our journey home A really lovely touch
The staff was so lovely kind and helpful The reception staff is really prepared about everythink really enjoyed my stay Ps The chocolate biscuit at the arrival was amazing
I liked everything Our stay was perfect   The location was perfect Close to everything we needed Sightseeing shopping centres cafes pubs and bars tube stations All of these are only a short walk away
Smart well presented hotel easy to get too with very friendly and helpful staff The rooms are excellent with all the amenities you expect of a modern hotel Overall a very pleasurable experience

Room was quite warm Canadian dollar made room expensive executive lounge was good but hours a limited for food and alcohol  Good size and large room Very comfortable my meetings were only 10 min by walking
The queue for breakfast was terrible The room was small for an executive queen size room View of a building site   Bed was comfortable and clean Executive lounge was great with coffee and tea
The beds were as hard as rocks Very uncomfortable bedding and pillows   The hotel was not far from transportation either by bus or train Taxis were always easily available also
long queues check in and check out even worse small monitor for Mac plus TV in bedroom with a small hand held device for changing channels very impractical   Bedrooms were comfortable

The size of the room a delux for three people room 422 was far far to crammed couldn t get past chair at computer without climbing over the bed No place to put our two suitcases except in the window sill Tiny 2nd bed   I liked the look of the hotel and decor I liked slippers and dressing gowns in the room

I asked for a room with a bath and high floor Although I got floor 5 of 13 I got no bath However I did check in at 10 instead of 3 which is check in time Also the maids in the hotel could have looked a bit more cheerful as it made it awkward walking past   The bed was amazing So big and comfy best sleep I ve had in a while The black out curtains also were fabulous There was loads of space in the room for me and my partner The iMac was brilliant too useful for us tourists

Room was small We were upgraded to a bigger room which we had paid for anyway and it was still small The minibar was empty We had to order 2 tiny bottles of cola and were charged 10 for them   Staff were superb and very helpful

We booked a king size bed and we got a queen sized one Slight difference but we didn t receive a refund   10 minutes walking to the best locations Big Ben Westminster two metro stations London Eye Even MI6 building

Really great comfortable hotel staff were excellent and very helpful Breakfast was good and the rooms were clean and comfortable Perfect for a little city break Very easy to different areas on the nearby tube too The lounge bar had a nice relaxed vibe with excellent cocktails

We had executive rooms and although the executive suite had snacks and basic drinks they could have had a better range  The hotel allowed us to check in early as they had a room ready which was perfect as the weather outside was awful The concierge was very attentive when ordering us taxis and looking after our bags the day we checked out

Asked for early check in got a reply that s fine When we turned up in the morning said room is still being prepared but they can upgrade us to executive room for extra 150 per person per night That s disgusting   Clean comfortable room Room was soundproof there was road works going on outside couldn t hear a thing in room

There was no leisure facilities Had we known this prior to booking we never would of gone Booked months in advance and requested a twin room and upon arrival was asked did we really need a twin as they had none left Breakfast staff excellent great selection of food shame about the quality of the hot buffet Average at best   Staff were very helpful with directions places to eat etc warm cookie on arrival very nice touch
The only downside was that a bath in the room would have made it perfect   The location is excellent with just a short walk to the attractions the staff were very helpful and friendly
Queues at breakfast were uncomfortable   Staff are very helpful and were quick and efficient when it became clear that we would have to change rooms due to a faulty lock

There was no mention to us of all the building work going on around the hotel   The hotel was nice and clean and the executive lounge was a very nice bonus The staff in the bar and executive lounge were very nice

Colleague will not use a lift and stairs upto 8th floor were very grubby and it felt more like a service stairwell rather than another option for paying customers instead of using the lift  Have stayed at this hotel on a few occasions now for both business and pleasure and location service and food options are great for our needs

Not impressed by the view from my window MI5 Not happy that as a pensioner it took me quite a while to work my television once I found out it was a telly and choice of stations not to my liking You could have had Hot Choc as a drink option Chose not to stay for breakfast as I was cold in my room cold air coming from somewhere and just wanted to go home it was snowing but no fault of the hotel   I was happy to be a few minutes from where I needed to be on the night
Within easy reach of tube central London situation well equipped rooms very comfortable bed pleasant staff In general had feel of high class without the stuffiness that so often accompanies this

It s just a shame that the nearest tube station is Pimlico a good 10 15 minute walk away Taxis needed at night time   Good location by the Thames and near to the houses of parliament etc Great to walk to attractions Victoria Station Buckingham Palace The Serpentine all within 20 mins walk Great bar for late evening coffee and nightcaps
The price of the food and drinks in the hotel restaurant Paying 12 for one glass of cocktail should be illegal  The staff were so walm and welcoming the rooms were so clean lovely

No effort made for our anniversary even though informed beforehand I asked to change rooms to at least have a view of the river as opposed to a building site no joy so will not be staying here again   Executive lounge was good and the service was excellent as was the concierge service
Very efficient friendly staff When checking in we were given a lovely warm cookie which was nice Breakfast was excellent Good location too within walking distance to a lot of major attractions
Staff were lovely very attentive made you feel vey welcome We arrived on a Sunday afternoon we had a problem with operating heating cooling maintenance staff arrived within minutes Bus was very handy
maintenance issue reported at 7 am on way to breakfast returned to room 8 am and not dealt with told on check out maintenance issues only dealt with after 8 am   location room quality

The only thing I personally did not like was that I it was very difficult to get the shampoo conditioner body cream out of the bottles As we travelled only with hand luggage we could not get any of that with us Also the PC mouse in the room of my kids did not work propper but nothing to worry about as we where out anyway the whole day   It was great Large room very comfortable good breakfast Everything we needed

I had booked a room with access to executive lounge Befor booking I enquired timing of serving drinks wine and beer etc and hot snacks and told 7 9pm but when I arrived around 8 15pm I was told timing for drinks and hot snacks was from 5 30 to 7 30 pm I wasted money by paying extra for a facility I could not enjoy   Staff was friendly

Bit of a trek to the tube building work surrounding hotel although ar weekend this was not a problem I expect during the week it might be Bed too firm for me   Breakfast was excellent room clean and quiet staff friendly

Their in room publication said breakfast was served until 11 am We then had a lie in and got downstairs at 10 30 am to be told that was only weekends The publication did not indicate this   It was a lovely hotel

We asked for a lower room as one of us doesn t use lifts We were initially allocated a room on the 4th floor and had to use an emergency back stairs After complaining the Manager got us a room on the 2nd floor which also necessitated using back stairs There didn t appear to be a proper carpeted staircase which was very disappointing and so we will not stay there again   The location was suitable for our schedule

We checked in for one night We later returned and checked in for a second night The receptionist when we returned wasn t exactly welcoming or accommodating   Even the standard rooms have every facility that you could need
Upgraded to Executive but too much verbal information of entertainment needed something in writing but pleased with offer   Ease of booking in and out and facilities available
Price of breakfast at 21 50 is very expensive especially for families   Friendly and helpful staff Air conditioned rooms Apple iMac in each room

Double bed very small for a 4 star Would expect king in a double room Bathroom a bit warn Lack of drawers Computer instead of TV did not work easily mouse problem and could not turn off from remote   Great location Staff were helpful
Hair dryer cable was far to short to effectively use as the sockets were no close to any mirror No view   Good Breakfast Staff very helpfull and efficient

quite a way from the nearest tube station call me old fashioned but would have preferred a standard TV to the Mac  very clean modern decent size rooms for London Really convenient for conference centre
I felt we were further out than I origanally thought we got taxis everywhere but we had a great time  Very comfortable hotel friendly staff rooms were a good size

Bit pricey for what you actually get I know it has the Hilton name But it didnt seem that special I found a ball of matted hair in my room It wanted to charge me an additional 50 in case i used anything qhen i arrived I wasnt aware of it before hand   The location was good Walkable to Westminster or Pimlico station

the surrounding construction and especially the view looking to the construction was very unattractive and noisy  It s the second tme I stayed in this hotel I like the breakfast voriety the view in the upper floors if available the helpfillness of the staff

When we came in the hotel we asked the reception desk if there are 2 more roll beds which we had asked for before our coming The receptionist confirmed that yes and there was only one double bed in the room Then we had to ask for twice to add the extra bed only one instead of two Even if we were staying for two nights we were asked to move from one room to another for every single night We also had prepaid entrance in the Executive Lounge with some refreshment and our card was not valid so we had to ask the reception dest again to help us This we could accept at some no name hotel but surprised us at Hilton   Very friendly people nice clean and large rooms excellent breakfast an Apple computer in the apartment
I was in a disability access room which I didn t mind except it was rather starkly furnished Perhaps all the rooms are starkly furnished   Modern clean quiet pleasant

Our request for rooms with bathtubs were never considered Though I can understand the hotel was full during our stay Hot food at the buffet being way too salty   Friendly helpful staff Nice location Spacious room for London Meeting room with a brilliant view at a nice price for London
N a  Staff were emailed prior to arrival as had complaint with another Hilton hotel They ensured our stay went without any hiccups and were very friendly and professional

Quite a walk from a tube station Also took 50 pound a night on arrival in case we used any extras This was forced and we were not asked if this was okay and then when we checked out we were told it would be 2 3 days before the 150 pound was back in our account Joke   Very clean comfy bed quiet
The lack of choice of food in the bar eating area and the cost of the good and the drinks A big difference in relation to our stay the same time last year   Rooms and reception
Had trouble with heating but sorted and communal telephone didnt work when I had difficulty getting into my room Reported it to reception   Staff were AMAZING and very generous
This hotel was in a quiet location and it was perfect for me and my friends The room was lovely and clean Really enjoyed the breakfast lots of choice
Some unfriendly receptionists No more view because of new buildings all around   Very nice housekeepers and waiters waitresses in millbank lounge and breakfast room

Room size is ok but not big location is walking distance to metro st and thames bridge maybe it is little bit expensive in comparison to other EU capitals  New hotel clean bar is nice comfortable bad breakfast is ok

Mini fridge had no contents Kitchens closed at 11 30pm so when we returned from a RWC match there was only an option of a cheese sandwich or order in a pizza Pillows too soft and bed wobbly every time on of us turned we were woken by the shaking bed   Millbank Lounge was lovely if pricey Staff very friendly and helpful

We had three leaks in three days 1 the shower in the room above ours leaked into ours which was gross It had obviously happened before and the hotel had to be aware of that when they put us in the room because there were water stains on the shower ceiling when we moved in 2 condensation or leaked from the air conditioner in the entryway ceiling 3 the bathroom sink leaked This was not an inexpensive stay and I expected better for my money   Staff was great very responsive The room was a nice size and was comfortable bed was very comfortable Reasonably close to underground and taxis always available The neighborhood was quiet at night and where we wanted to be

The door to the bathroom was a folding door and was not easy to close as you had to drag it along the opening There was an unpleasant smell from the drainage occasionally   Hotel in good location which suited us clean fantastic breakfast which was plentiful

The booking in at reception was the worst I ve ever had the booking had been dealt with wrongly we had double rooms instead of twin both rooms on separate floors as a group under one booking it wasn t exceptable   The breakfast was very good service poor
I disliked the second bed isn t bedroom two bed The second bed was for the kids and we don t have two kit for the bathroom   I liked the localisation and the quiet Good breakfast and easy going

30 per day parking Still cheaper than on street charges in Pimlico though   Friendly helpful staff Great location Clean and comfortable Nice bar for meeting up with friends cocktails and end of the evening coffees We ll definitely be back If you re looking for a more authentic and less costly breakfast experience look out Tony s cafe 5 mins walk away towards Pimlico friendly big portions great greasy cafe we loved it

This has been mentioned in other reviews but just to reiterate The shower is a bit tight and the water temperature has a tendency to change to scalding and then to ice cold in rapid succession before returning to your desired temperature Sort of like what happens when someone flushes a toilet while you are showering Not a big deal just something to be aware of especially if you are traveling with children   London is a pricey town and this hotel was exactly what you would expect from a Doubletree anywhere else at a premium price That may sound bad but it isn t meant that way We had a very comfortable room and we enjoyed the location very much The staff was nice we didn t really spend much time with them except for check in and check out but they were friendly and professional We traveled in early September 2015 and it seemed as if the hotel was filled with mostly business travelers There is still construction happening across the street from the hotel we did not experience any issues with noise but if you re looking for a spectacular view that could be problematic Once again this is not the hotels fault just something to be aware of before you decide to book Overall the room was comfortable and spacious enough for us and our luggage and you can t beat the location if you are interested in seeing Big Ben and Westminster Abbey which are all very close by It also makes it easier to catch one of the boat rides on the Thames that take off from Westminster pier

The room was generally clean and comfortable as you would expect at a Hilton property but there was a previous occupant s hair not from their head on the bathroom floor which we noticed on arrival There is a large building being constructed next to the hotel and although we didn t have any issues whatsoever with noise the construction was the only view from our bedroom On one occasion during our stay we tried to call the 24 hour room service number but there was no answer although the staff on Reception were very apologetic and dealt with this professionally and promptly The shower temperature after it was adjusted to your preference sometimes fluctuated between freezing cold and very hot This wasn t so much of a problem for the adults as we could move out of the flow but we had to be very vigilant if showering with our 2 year old child we forgot to request a room with a bath We only reported this on check out and the staff did not have the opportunity to resolve this during our stay so this is by no means a comment on the service we received which was overall very good   Friendly helpful staff Good location Delicious complimentary cookie on arrival

Seems a bit petty but the Breakfast area is a bit small and some guests were really loud when talking I can never understand why people have to talk loud to someone on the same table across the room that I can hear every word they say Also people talking on mobile phones with the speaker on so that they can eat their food and have a discussion at the same time very rude but not the hotels fault   We have stayed here before so knew what to expect the staff were friendly and check in was relatively easy My wife and I enjoy walking and it is a nice walk into Oxford street from the Hotel and also had a great walk around Kensington Gardens and Hyde park The breakfast choices were very good and the restaurant had a good selection and what we had was cooked really well It was also a nice atmosphere sitting outside in the evenings having a drink Definitely will be going to the Blakemore again

The green light in the room couldn t be turned off Charged incorrectly for a meal nothing done about it Breakfast buffet staff manager very overzealous about how much one person could eat   Location

Nothing  Beautiful hotel friendly staff I had a junior suite which was fabulous plenty of room with a sep lounge area and lovely big bath It is a great location easy walk to Queensway shops with plenty of food options for any taste buds easy walking to Kensington gardens as well as Buckingham palace if your able took us about 20 mins cutting through Hyde park

Nothing  This was the second time my friend and l have stayed here Great location near two tube stations Rooms very nice beds comfy Lovely big fluffy bath towels and luxurious toilet paper Buffet breakfast really good Helpful friendly staff

There was a seemingly unjustified distinction between the complimentary Continental breakfast and the several additional hot items bacon sausage scrambled eggs that constituted the Full English option for an additional charge Many hotels in Sweden offered a full buffet breakfast including such hot items as waffles eggs bacon and sausage and sometimes potatoes etc without such a distinction so this seemed petty I might have enjoyed the occasional serving of bacon but the Continental breakfast was more than adequate with a variety of breads pastries cold cuts cheese fruit yogurt and cereal including hot porridge on request   Excellent hotel with full service and fine facilities for an extended stay Friendly and helpful staff the receptionist recommendation for a very good Greek continental restaurant nearby when we arrived after the hotel kitchen had closed porter service to handle our baggage we were traveling with an unusual number of large bags concierge can summon taxi quickly from a reliable provider attentive service in bar restaurant The restaurant was very good There was a very pleasant terrace for bar and restaurant patrons and the lobby bar seating was comfortable and appealing The Continental breakfast in the basement dining area was very satisfactory with wait staff who recognized guests checked in for multi day stays remembered food preferences
This is our favourite location in London close to walks in the park and many antique shops and nice restaurants Our first time at the Blakemore and we will come here again

Absolutely brilliant   Wonderful hotel to stay Best location Lots of shops to go and have breakfast lunch and dinner Good shopping Hyde park down the rode Just wonderful

The welcoming at the desk was not good and friendly Dont remember her name We could not charge our phones and didnt got help Our rooms aircondition was cold or hot and straight to bed There was too loud music in the breakfast but we were too busy to tell that at the time   The doorman in the lobby was very nice and helpful Room was clean and nice Hotels location is great

Lift was a little slow But wasn t a big problem Just easy walk down the stairs when it took too long to come to thd floor   Great location and very comfortable beds Great bar as well with nice relaxing environment

No view but didn t matter We weren t there to look out of a window   Excellent location with public transport within walking distance The staff were very friendly and helpful Breakfast was great Room was very comfortable and clean The proximity to Hyde Park was really nice

thin walls and doors you can hear noise from the corridor and your neighbour The silicone in the shower need to be refreshed black spots it poor breakfast   Localization size of the room fitness room very helpful staff nice building and lobby design of the room possibility to open the window hair dryer

The cleaning lady had taken my waterbottle from my backpack during the roomcleaning when me and my son weren t in the room It s wrong that the cleaning lady had been digging in my personal belongings and taken the bottle from my own backpack

dirty room invaded by dust poor daily cleaning 1 elevator serving a lot of people waiting time is crazy The steps of the stairs are less than one foot wide standard which makes it not only uncomfortable but risky ceiling is not sound proof steps of people walking upside are heard very loudly One feels a bomb is explosing doors closing system very noisy and disturbing all night long toothpaste is extra charged no water bottles provided in the room generally the hotel lacks basic structural features   Nothing special

Over priced drinks some personnel not very friendly   The room was comfortable The morning service for breakfast was good Restaurant food was good Concierge was very helpful

When we arrived our room was not ready so we checked our luggage in while we went for lunch When we got back the desk clerk chased down the bellman to get our luggage He retrieved our luggage and placed it carefully in a corner that was about 2 feet from where we were standing instead of handing it to us and then walked away never speaking a word So we didn t know if we were to take it or if someone would bring it for us We took it and went to our room A very awkward early experience The room could benefit from some updating Floor tile was cracked in several places the bathroom and would move when walked upon The hairdryer is attached to the inside of a drawer on the desk I suspect this is done to prevent theft but it is highly impractical since the mirror is off to the side and the cord of the hairdryer is not long enough to reach the mirror You have to dry style your hair blindly Internet service though free was very unreliable I attempted to write this review earlier but couldn t get on the internet Cleaning staff was inconsistent sometimes they left coffee and cream packets other times not On one occasion when we asked room service to bring up cream they brought it in a small metal creamer We left the creamer out so the cleaning staff would pick it up and they never did Instead the cream was left to spoil   Located walking distance to several tube stations Easy to get around to the hot tourist spots and restaurants Common areas of the hotel restaurants bar lobby were very nice would rate them higher than the overall rating Food and service at the Terrace Restaurant is excellent

Rathbone Hotel looks quite impressive from the street but also a little out of place being situated on a back street off Tottenham Court Road As a lone female I m afraid I didn t feel very safe arriving quite late at night as I did The hotel s policy seems to be that they hold a fee on your credit debit card for potential purchases even before you ve decided to use any bar services I managed to talk the reception staff out of this due to my late arrival but it s not appreciated to try bumping up a guest s final bill especially if they might be on a budget If I had wanted to spend more money I d have used a more centrally located hotel with more stars   A very warm welcome on arrival staff were very friendly both in person on the telephone I arrived quite late at night having called ahead earlier in the day to advise and this was no problem at all I really just used the Rathbone as a place to lay my head at the end of a very busy day of theatre with friends I d booked a Single room I was pleasantly surprised at how much space was allocated The bed was dressed in spotlessly clean white cotton sheets big fluffy pillows an absolute pleasure to fall into after such a busy day Bathroom was quite small a little dated but perfectly functional with very nice toiletries to hand No noise issues rare for central London although there was a big gap at the base of my door so unsure whether this might be an issue on other occasions I didn t get a chance to use any of the hotel s public rooms bars so am unable to comment In summary it s a very nice hotel at the cheaper end of London s accommodation perhaps a little dated but very clean friendly

The only slight improvements needed are a couple of hooks in the bathroom and some shelves for placing clothes during longer stays   The hotel is a gem The staff was incredibly helpful and friendly The room was spacious and perfectly clean the bathroom was very modern and the bed was probably the most comfortable that we have ever had in a hotel Despite being a little outside the center the hotel was a great base for visiting most tourist sites The Pernety metro station is literally one minute away and offers easy transfers to many of the main lines We very much appreciated that the hotel offered a choice of a light breakfast and a fuller buffet While the hotel does not have parking we were able to find a parking nearby at a really reasonable rate using a parking app We will definitely stay here again
The neighborhood was quiet and peaceful And the staff was helpful Breakfast was delicious Highly recommend staying here as it is very near to the metro

My friend and i had an interesting experience at this hotel The night we stayed there the fire alarm went off early in the morning we found out the next day that apparently there was a mechanical problem with the system and this was the third time in three months the fire alarm went off without any clear causes I d urge management to fix this problem as soon as possible The communication between staff members needs improvement Upon checking in we asked to extend our check out time by an hour to 1 00pm in the afternoon To our surprise and disappointment between 12 00 1 00 the next day three staff members walked into our room without consent while my friend and I were changing and packing I communicated to the property manager the next morning about our unpleasant experience and received a 25 refund upon my insistence I would not recommend this hotel unless there is significant improvement in its management   The property is very new judging from the smell of fresh paint in the room The design is fresh and modern That said much is to be desired from management service and communication

No fridge in the room No double bed two slim single beds combined which was not perfectly comfortable Toilet is not properly separated from the room no sound insulation at all Complemantary phone was promised inside the description but we did not receive any in the room When asked the receptionist told that this is not a promised feature but convinced when I showed the hotel description where this is clearly listed as a hotel feature At the end he worked to get a phone for us thanks for that Personal on the reception which is there on the night was not very helpful we assumed he may be a student   Very close to the metro station pernety M4 literally 2 minutes away Stylish room design Very good neighborhoud pretty nice places to dine or have breakfast grocery store just opposite of the store which is open until late Breakfast was pretty good Very clean room

The storage of our clothes was a bit tricky we had an interesting hanging wardrobe but there was just not enough space   This hotel was a real find and we wouldn t hesitate a minute to come back here again Everything was created with care and taste obviously inspired by art deco designs the reception the little library the terrace in the central yard and our room in the second building All quiet you don t need an alarm we woke up by the singing of the birds and flawlessly clean Besides a special thanks to the lovely and helpful reception team they all represent their house just perfectly The management should be very happy to have them Merci encore une fois

There was nothing I did not like   The hotel is nicely located at a quiet neighborhood From the Eiffel Tower is a 12 to 15 ride which is ok The bedroom was clean and lovely The breakfast was great I will definately stay there next time

The hotel in itself is quite okay however some issues hold it back The safe in our room was small not laptop sized did not work no batteries and was not bolted to the wall The staff was very friendly and offered us to switch rooms however having partly unpacked we did not want the extra hustle This could have been resolved in advance especially since we only checked in at around 8pm We did store our valuables in the hotel safe at the reception and the one in our room got fixed inserted batteries a day later The room itself lacks a cupboard to store clothes I did not check that when booking only a few hangers without the option to hang pants If you are staying for more than a couple of days travel with suits this may be an issue The breakfast was very disappointing Monotone with very few options Haven t been to Paris many times so difficult to know the local standards I am travelling a lot for work leisure and this was one of the worst hotel breakfasts I ve had the pleasure to have I would recommended opting for the sans breakfast option   There was a lot to like about this hotel It is relatively new and well renovated The positives include Excellent and helpful staff always friendly and eager to help Very clean room Convenient location next to the Metro station A very good bed Excellent air con quiet and cool and Decent sound insulation from the inside

Nice clean hotel with very friendly staff Small but perfectly equipped and clean rooms We loved the smartphone with unlimited call and data credit and used it all the time while navigating through the city looking for transport resto sights etc Great breakfast you get to choose between an express breakfast croissant bread at the front of the hotel excellent value for money or a more elaborate and thus slightly more expensive buffet breakfast at the back Great location a 2 mins walk to the Pernety metro station The 14th district is very charming and quiet but still has lots of options for bars resto grocery shopping etc Easily accessible by car there s no parking at the hotel but we rented a parking space just around the corner in Rue d Eure using the ZenPark app and that worked flawlessly I definitely recommend this hotel and right now May 2017 prices are very reasonable though that might change since I understood from the staff that the hotel only just opened a couple of months ago

I had a room facing the street which was a little noisy at times due to the pub on the corner but this wasn t much of a problem I imagine if you want a quieter room this can be requested   This is my new fave hotel The staff were exceptionally helpful and friendly particularly with helping me to book attraction passes offer food recommendations and help me get my bearings My room was divine I loved the fixtures artwork and clever use of a small space and I had a beautiful view There is a gorgeous little courtyard for visitors to enjoy a light honesty bar coffee and croissant or in my case an evening BYO beer with another indoor study area nearby The Pernety station is a stone s throw away which easily connects you to the main part of the city however the area has stacks of delicious cafes and places to explore I will definitely be recommending this beautiful boutique hotel to others and hope to come back soon

Breakfast available in 2 separate buildings exactly 6 steps were confusing but it was just a minor issue probably in summer You will find it as a as between these buildings You will find a great place to dine  Definitely people stand behind success of this place Obviously comfortable beds tasty breakfasts and great locations also determine BoB Hotel as a great place to stay while visiting Paris

There might be more non French channels on TV but not a big deal who s coming to Paris to watch a TV The only thing we didn t like was the lack of closets there was no space to keep clothes and stuff during our stay we had to keep things in the luggage on a chair etc   Absolutely great kind and helpful staff The hotel is new and all furniture and facilities flawless The smartphone with free calls and internet was an amazing help for us tourists to fully enjoy Paris and never get clueless We liked the bathroom especially the lighting in it tiny LEDs installed in the wall looked like stars in the sky The location is great a metro station is just a minute away there are restaurants shops grocery market and coin laundry nearby Depending on your preferences and exploration style with good route planning it s quite possible to check majority of Paris landmarks just by walking

Space of breakfast area   Cozy new hotel nearly Pernety metro station Very kind staff very clean hotel comfortable bed nice breakfast There is a complementary smartphone to use with 4G internet which is helpful around the city s landmarks Total recommendation

The room has no wardrobe and only 5 hangers looks good but not convenient at all especially for 2 people The sliding door to the bathroom is heavy and has no handle so is impossible to close   Staff were great with directions recommendations taxi bookings friendly and spoke great English The smart phone in the room is a brilliant idea Took this around Paris and followed the recommendations V handy if you have no data whilst in France Pernety station is only a 30 second walk You can connect to all major stations from here easily Supermarket a few minutes away and various places to eat Definitely recommend

The room didn t had a wardrobe and it has a fancy hangers instead that are almost useless   The hotel location is good very close to the Pernety metro station 1 minute walk some coffeeshops nearby quiet street The staff was friendly and helpful The hotel seems to be new or recently refurbushed and the room with a beautful decoration was nice not big nor small but nice for Paris standards with a really very good bed The bathroom is small but the shower is very good and plenty of space We didn t had the breakfast at the hotel by option but the ground floor was nice with a small backyard

The room was a bit small but this is not problem for us because we stayed only two days and didn t have lots of clothes I am writing this to warn the people who will stay in a long time with too many clothes   I like the design of room so much Also the lighting in the room was fantastic Staff was friendly and warm The best service was the Ringme service There was a mobile phone with a lots of useful information about Paris and with an nternet so you can carry this phone with you when you travel around the city without getting lost

Far from city center but close to Metro and best way to get around is with Uber also the rooms had no closets or drawers to put away your clothes  Loved this hotel clean sound proof very accommodating and young staff they offer complimentary coffee and water I would highly recommend this hotel to business travelers and single people

The rooms could have been a little bigger but overall was very good   Very nice room very clean Really helpful staff and extremely good location Would defitnely recommend friends and family to stay here

The breakfast is a little complicated as food is in two different rooms that are separated by an atrium and the coffee machine not the easiest to use for example if you require only a dash of milk   Staff are extremely helpful friendly and accomodating unlike most Parisien hotels The hotel is recently refurbished to a high standard and so everything is spotlessly clean and works For Parisien standards the room and bathroom was quite big and the bed very comfortable Overall a very nice hotel and as icing on the cake it has the same name as me

1 2 out of 3 rooms we should checked in were already occupied This is a bad experience after a long drive since you just want a break The organisation wasn t good and an excuse because of Eastern isn t an excuse Please upgrade your hotel system 2 No towels in the room and in the bathroom were still boxes to repair some stuff no go use the stockroom for that 3 The heater wasn t working and it was freezing cold in the room Even the employee said it was freezing cold 4 The socket wasn t working to charge your electronics Overall the room 205 wasn t ready to be rented and therefore never shouldn t be rented out to someone for this prize We checked out after one night and it wasn t value wasn t worth the money   1 The bed was comfy and the room size is good 2 The area is fully loaded with restaurants

Breakfast was very tasty but also very bad organised When we came literally everything was finished No bread no spreads no fruits nothing Also the breakfast area is split up in two separate rooms causing you to walk in the rain to the other breakfast area for some spreads Space is also limited   The location was great close to the metro close to some nice restaurants and pubs WiFi is good fast and it is stable and good enough for browsing watching videos etc The staff is very friendly helpful and willing to help you find places around
little soap no closet very small elevator late breakfast and unorganized room was very late due to unclear security problem  free coffee and fruits great bed great shower

The hotel is located close to the tube station where you can jump in and travel to centre of Paris just under 20 mins All staff we met are very friendly and helpful The room is exceptionally clean and quite provided a house party was being held across the street You can see Eiffel Tower on the balcony

Very limited choice for breakfast almost nothing is available no omelette no eggs no yogurt 1 type of ham only 1 bottle of orange juice no fresh fruits not enough cheese 2 types and few pieces are available Basicly the breakfast was coffee croissant bread jam honey nutella and a piece of cheese if you managed to find some Smell of paint in the room building recently finished no coffee machine in the rooms only coffee sticks boiler no creamer absence of closet shelves dressing  friendly staff clean hotel and rooms acceptable room surface good room insulation
The hotel is brand new very modern and with beautifully decorated rooms The patio garden is extremely nice on a nice summer day I loved my stay there

Our second last day there they didn t change trash bin and mop bathroom Overall the stay was lovely   Great staff everyone is so happy and customers were all so nice felt so comfortable and the phone was bouns didn t have to worry about SIM card Very helpful staff and location is plus Enjoy your stay

The elevator was a little bit crazy went up when it wanted and narrow but there are stairs   Good place in Paris with a kind staff The space in the room is optimized There are interesting restaurants around
More hangers for clothes but that s really a minor issue   Really nice boutique hotel Good location stylish rooms very friendly staff
