Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: As above Breakfast was included in the price   Unfortunately we were not able to have any breakfast as we were catching the Eurostar and had to be at St Pancras by 6 30 am The front desk tried to be helpful and hoped that we could be given a croissant etc if we went to the kitchen any time after 6am This we did but all we were given was a packet of Fruit and Nut Cereal and Alpen each Not a lot of use without milk

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: the stench in the breakfast room the mouldy smell and dirty carpets in room  space room size and helpful staff offered me an extra bed without further charge

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Understand that space at a premium but bathroom very small for family of 4   Clean and very comfortable beds Well equipped kitchenette Very convenient for Eurostar

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Expensive but we needed to be close to the train station   Location location location Close to trains restaurants shopping Staff was very friendly and went above and beyond to help out with our extreme early checkout so that we can get something to eat before leaving at 6am Just pricey for one night but again cant beat the location cleanliness and hospitality

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: breakfast could have been better and more varied  beds v comfy aircon good v clean booked for access to trains which is excellent breakfast OK Has good TV wifi etc we booked a suite which is great for sharing and has the kitchen Will keep using

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: The bathroom had draining issues slight water coming up though the tiles I believe they are trying to fix but would have liked to be advised on check in When I told the front desk staff he said I know   Convenience location comfortable beds our room was a great size for the 3 of us Good kitchenette Great simple Breakfast was all you need toast cereal yoghurt pasteries juice and coffee

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: We were beautifully looked after and nearby building works did not cause us any noise or inconvenience   The hotel is very very convenient to bus and trains with plenty of places to eat but if looking for good pub food the Skinners Arms in Judd Street recommended and basic pub food at McGlynns just around the corner in Whidborne Street with a lot less hassle and cigarette smoke The counter staff and kitchen staff were friendly and helpful and both times we stayed our rooms may have been a little unusual this is an old building but they were very comfortable and quiet and they have a LIFT We travelled by cab if unsure of direction but the buses generally were easy to follow The tube is good once you know your way around and the direction you want to travel A great address from which to explore London

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: The room for the parents does not have ventilation natural light and it is terrible for somebody who suffers claustrophoby   The design of the room is perfect for a family

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Staff at reception super friendly and helpful Small breakfast room which was superbly clean Room was a great size with nice facilities Bathroom a little on the cozy side Nice that there was a c and a separate double bedroom attached to the main triple bedroom

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: directions to get there i am always lost to know what direction to leave underground stations to find my way   location close to kingscross pancreas stations little English pub aprox 100m up the street to the right with excellent home cooked cheap food etc

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Nothing   Fantastic location in terms of accessibility to St Pancras station Within walking distance 15 minutes of UCL Great sized room contained 2 single beds and a double Microwave fridge iron ironing board hairdryer all provided Good selection of continental breakfast choices

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: A full english breakfast as a selection and orange juice was not available   The room itself was so spacious I didn t expect a double bed and 2 singles The staff in reception were excellent Very clean and tidy Great selection at breakfast Good value for money Excellent location Will definitely stay here again

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: There is another comfort inn a few blocks away this can be a bit confusing for cab Drivers and tired visitors Not the most attractive area for a long London stay The elevator stop one floor down from our room top floor but staff very kindly helped with bags I just wish hotels in London where a bit cheaper as I could come more often   This hotel was perfect for a short stay in London that involves taking the Eurostar and traveling with people that want a sure level of comfort and no surprises We 3 adults certainly appreciated the big triple room No one had to share a bed or sleep on a convertible sofa And There was space Not beds squished together Room was also very clean and all the staff attentive and pleasant Having a good breakfast included was a real plus I find every thing in london expensive so I did feel that value for money was pretty good Being close to kings cross and saving the sweat of haulingbags long distances and the stress of catching trains on time due to trafic was worth the cost

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Thought it was a horrible room as it was below street level so no windows Also thought advertised picture of room accommodation misleading as picture was really of the breakfast area No microwave even though this was an advertised part of the accommodation They were unable to provide a microwave which meant the kitchenette was not very useful The price of the accommodation was a bit expensive   Location only

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Suite I had was on basement level ie down 1 from reception round corner from kitchen Had a window but view only to little area below ground level   Location was primary selection criteria and was perfect from that point very short and flat walk from St Pancras Kings Cross Stations Building is an old terrace very nicely modernised modern fit out good sized lift excellent facilities in room inc kitchen which would be excellent if staying several days Bright clean kitchen and good continental breakfast Don t know if all rooms the same but booking was for double suite which ended up coming with double bed and 2 singles when all I needed was a double bed given primacy of location in selection and space quality of fitout didn t matter

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Poor Wifi in bedroom   Very conveniently situated 3 minutes walk from St Pancras station Met the expectation I had when I booked Nice staff good value for money Quiet comfortable clean

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: There was really nothing we did not like except the fact our room was in the basement and a little claustrophobic for me This was a minor thing   Proximity to kings cross station is great Easily found Good breakfast in the morning

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: It is just tiny Reception was tiny Lift was tiny Room was tiny Toilet was tiny But it was clean and the right price for a one night visit   In all fairness this was booked solely for its location near St Pancras train station for ease of train travel the next day It was a place to sleep It met that expectation

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Family room on the top floor elevator stopped the floor below We had significant luggage and it was awkward to bag drag after the elevator only one floor but just a quirk of the layout   Excellent Value for the money Family room accommodated 3 adults nicely Easy location near Kings Cross Tube station Very clean

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Room was quite small and bathroom was very small but shower was a decent size The bed was a double and not very comfortable didn t sleep that well for all of the 3 nights   Extra sink fridge in room microwave and tea and coffee facilities

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: We booked a double suite expecting this to be a double bed extra seating relaxation space A double suite turned out to be two bedrooms only limited seating a small dining table chairs for 4 people   Close proximity to Kings Cross easy to find

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: The water pressure of the taps and shower was poor   Modern feel in an old building comfortable beds Black out curtains and blinds air con tv in both rooms kitchen area with microwave

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Generally People on footpaths smoking and in doorways you have to go through on way to buus n tube   Great staff Convenient to transport dining You do need to under stand direction for travel on bus n tube We are aussies n made a couple of mistakes but all part of our stay When used to travelling by car it takes time on buses n trains but you see more

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Small rooms and tiny bathroom Too pricey for the room size   Stayed one night because it was a location close to the train station We came in from Paris and left for Heathrow the next morning The rooms and bathrooms are small The continental breakfast was good and convenient

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Probably more variety for breakfast   The apartment is located really near the underground station Reception counter was also really friendly and shared about interesting places to visit Overall a good experience

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: We would prefer the upstairs room that was more spacious and looked out to street the groundfloor room was noisy as it opened onto reception and was and was smaller than upstairs  great position to catch Eurostar and handy to tube station and easy eating places around the staff were very helpful and pleasant at all times would recommend this hotel

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: many of the USB plugs were broken the shower drain was pretty clogged so the water didn t drain properly ankle deep on one day the cleaning staff left a totally dirty towel they used for cleaning on the floor in the kitchen area   the room was a good size the staff were kind and helpful Location was perfect

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: the breakfast sucks I would have expected an english breakfast Insted there was bread and butter WITH NO HAM or SALAMI Some bananas milk This is NOT a real breakfast IT s a JOKE VERY VERY POOR Everything else was excellent   The staff was super friendly And professional No noise perfect for resting

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: We had booked a suite which we understood would have 2 rooms 1 with a bed and the other with a couch es We needed the extra room as we were traveling with a small child so we would have space for the crib and playing The room came with 2 large beds in each room and one single bed in the larger room The beds essentially filled the room so we were just able to squeeze the crib in between one of the beds and the walls There was very little space to move around I had read reviews prior to staying that people had difficulty with a suitcase and can definitely see how this would be an issue with a single room The room was located right off the foyer so we could hear louder guests but this was easily remedied by closing the fire doors between our room and the entry way   The location was convenient just a few minutes from the train station The room was clean enough and front desk staff was friendly It is a great hotel to stay in if you only need a place to stay and will spend the day out The breakfast is free and was ok It was convenient to go downstairs and get a cup of coffee or toast before starting the day If I hadn t been traveling with a small child my rating would be higher

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: N A  I missed breakfast as I was bit unwell with tummy upset The bed is comfortable The kitchen is useful with small fridge for us to bring some foods

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Having a reliable internet connection is the most important thing for business trips I had to go to my office at 11PM in the night given the WiFi just didn t work all through my stay And the staff just didn t seem to be taking my request seriously Won t recommend again

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Very small room Breakfast very poor and nothing warm to eat Nobody at breakfast totally self service   Location very close to train station and subway

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: I was told breakfast started at 0630 In fact it didnt start till 0700 I was told bedroom had a window i was in basement room and it had a piece of glass in wall It wasn t a window The quality of bed linen was poor very poor synthetic duvet and ynthetic pillows   Location if you need to be close to St Pancras KX

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Nothing   Location so convenient and easy to find I had booked a double room for myself and was given a whole suite Quiet and comfortable Staff helped with my suitcase

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: we were given a basement room smelly bathroom noisy from 6 am service team 2 cm gap a the bottom of the bedroom door could hear the tube passing under  location

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Some rooms are a bit noisy especially if close to the reception Breakfast could be a bit richer   Amazing position just few steps out of King s Cross train and Underground station Extremely cleaned rooms very good free WiFi Kind staff

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: not much actually maybe the stair to the upper floor not a problem for us but if you have big luggage isn t the best   The staff were really nice and helpful room are clean and with enough space for the 3 of us Breakfast was good and again staff very nice i will surely return to this hotel It is close to underground and train station just perfect

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Breakfast selection was limited good for wheat eaters and non dieters Suite 6 is very small with a smallish bed would be fine for single occupant travelling light No space for a chair in the room not much space for luggage Other suites are bigger Slept ok but woke with a sore back Rudely awakened at 6am on a Sunday morning by very loud TV in our room I guess the time was set by the previous occupant but didn t see any info about setting alarm on TV   Nice to have minikitchen fridge and microwave Decent quality crockery and cutlery Pleasant staff Breakfast pastries looked good Good location for Kings Cross St Pancras which has a mall and great restaurants if pricey

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Poor TV reception Small TV mounted too high Poor shower pressure and difficult to get in and out Only 2tea bags Requested more OK No heating in bathroom No toiletries   Good lift Quiet area Good coffee Comfortable bed Clean room

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: My suite was located just next to reception and I could hear every customer and every sound from any device This meant that I slept very badly during the whole stay The staff were kind enough to try to locate me to a different room but because the hotel was full it was not possible   The staff

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Damp room with a clear smell of mildew mind you my room was in the basement but otherwise it was clean Very thin walls and the internet was spotty I had some uncommonly loud neighbors that broke the rules and smoked in the hallways who did not make the stay restful but I cannot blame that on the hotel   Staff was very friendly and accommodating

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Heating was off room was cold and once the staff got the radiators working it took about an hour to heat up No lift to the top floor awkward with suitcase up narrow stairs  Room clean and well laid out

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Lacked a settee but I used the bed to sit on watch TV do work  Excellent Location only a few minutes walk from Kings Cross Station approx 7 minutes from Euston Station Ideal if using underground to travel around London Rooms clean comfortable There is no living room area had 2 bedrooms kitchen area Would use again due to location

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: No mirror in one of the bedrooms Door to room next to public toilet Noise from train tube quite noticeable as we were on the basement level  Staff were very helpful and location was ideal for our needs Room was clean water hot and breakfast adequate

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: The room was advertised as self catering but there was only a small microwave kettle and sink in the kitchen area I was expecting at least one hob ring and one saucepan There were no bowls etc for heating food in the microwave only two small cereal type bowls and two small plates Everything else was excellent although best get down to the breakfast room early before all the nice things go   Comfortable bed Clean towels provided daily Room was reasonably well insulated against noise from the rooms above and below when compared with some others that I have stayed in The staff were very friendly and helpful especially the young lady who manages the reception The room was nice and warm early February and there was a thermostat in the room so the temperature could be increased or reduced as required There were loads of channels available on the TV The bed headboard had excellent reading lights built into it

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Nothing  Just flown in from America and very tired Staff were very welcoming and helpful Room was a good size and toasty warm on a cold February evening Slept like a log room was really quiet as hotel is down a side street away from London noise Breakfast was a good continental and as much as you wanted Kings Cross station was at the end of the road so no need for taxis Brilliant

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Overrated and overpriced This should be in the category budget hotel I was told that my room was upgraded but I was put in a basement small room with no window I asked to change it Carpet in the room old looking dirty Lift not reaching the last floor 2ramps of narrow stairs ok with no luggage Breakfast very poor   Location

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Staff were very kind the hotel was surprisingly very nice for a Comfort Inn Suites breakfast was great and overall experience was great Will definitely stay here again

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: The air in the room was really stuffy not best for the people with asthma The air conditioning was really difficult to use so the temperature changed a lot in the room Some employees seemed a little confused about our questions and we had difficulties to get answers Some were really helpful for example with the air conditioning   Breakfast was ok We were really pleased that we could take breakfast with us when we had to leave before it began

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: The shower toilet was off of one of the bedrooms so the person sleeping in the other room could not visit the loo without going through the other bedroom Fine for us but may cause a problem for others The grill function on the microwave is abysmal so kitchen facilities really only suited for simple tea coffee and warming up a ready meal etc   Close to Kings Cross St Pancras Nice clean apartment room Had a mini fridge combination microwave kettle and cutlery crockery There was not a full kitchen setup like other apartment rooms this was just a kitchen area as part of one of the bedrooms Please note there s no proper oven or grill Seemed to be in a nice street despite people warning me that Kings cross can be a little bit dodgy

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Rooms and the bathroom are a bit small Noise in the hall and in the rooms above when people are leaving early Breakfast space is quite small making it hard to accommodate more than a few people   Friendly staff comfortable beds clean rooms and nice location

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Could hear people walking the stairs ir coming in lot of noise in room doors slamming bad matress window would not close could not sleep at all   Location

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Didn t like being in the basement one room had no windows Breakfast ham ran out on the second morning Some nice breakfast rolls would be better than sliced bread   Very comfortable beds very clean rooms everything you could possibly need Helpful staff mainly good breakfast Fantastic location two minutes walk from Kings Cross but very quiet

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Bathroom smelt really bad and even though a member of staff provided us with some air freshener it didn t permanently cover it Breakfast was disappointing with no hot food and only instant coffee out of machine   Beds and layout of room Location

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: I booked and paid for this for my daughter and her boyfriend When they arrived they were made to pay again as they would not accept the email I had sent her Disgusted that my daughter was put through quite a lot of stress the whole point of me paying in advance was so that she wouldn t have to

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Its very expensive for the basic level of comfort Poor breakfast I ve stayed in various cheaper hotels in London with a higher level of comfort and facilities   It s in a very convenient location especially if one needs Eurostar or lives on the Kings Cross or St Pancras train lines to or from London Staff were very friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Noise carried from corridors Some of the room lights and bathroom extractor fan didn t work but this didn t spoil our stay Tiny room and bathroom but what do you expect in central London at this price   Great location just a stone s throw from St Pancras Station Helpful staff looked after our baggage Breakfast fine for type of hotel

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Nothing  Close to St Pancras Kings Cross which was great for all connections Room was clean and functional with all amenities Stayed in basement suite and it was a little noisy in the morning with the breakfast room next door

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: The room was not as advertised I was expecting a studio apartment for two people with a kitchenette What we got was a three single bed room basement level The kitchenette was just a sink and a cupboard with a few items of crockery There were no cooking facilities at all yet your website advertised it as having these Thanks really helped us a lot Not   It was in a converted church property so the building is actually quite nice Unusual but good

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: The breakfast was beautifully presented but I would have liked a cooked breakfast eg scrambled eggs   Very comfortable rooms with free internet and a free mobile cell phone which guests can use around the city I was very comfortable there and it was so convenient to Kings Cross St Pancras stations which have lifts and escalator access All staff were very helpful

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: The torrent of water descending down the walls and ceiling from suite above   Excellent for families and our problems with the water coming down walls and ceiling from suite above was dealt with

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Room very small barely enough room to walk round bed or put ironing board up Noisy as room at top of stairs leading to breakfast room no chance of a lie in Didn t like the way I was asked for photo ID on arrival as a UK citizen I don t routinely carry my Passport in the U K or my driving licence if I ve travelled by train Didn t like the insinuation that I should carry it at all times but on this occasion they would overlook it I had paid in advance by credit card and had that card with me   Central location good Not too far off a main road but far enough Very easy from Kings Cross Station Breakfast room very clean with good choice of continental style breakfast Didn t use the in room kitchen facilities but would have been handy if staying longer Room clean with all the essentials if rather squashed in Kindly stored our bags after check out for a few hours

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: A little bit of noise especially when people are walking upstairs and in front of the room as the building is old building Security concern My friend could walk through to knock on my doorwithout anybody asking anything I left the luggage but got no evidrnce of receipt I came back later to take it out without anyboy asking or trying to stop me What if I took other people s stuff or what if my belonging got taken   Staff Location Facilities in room

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: I wish stay more days at this Hotel The room is huge comparing with the Hotels in the area and cheaper than the first one that I got The staff was really nice Very close by St Pancreas station just 5 minutes walking

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: As much as a member of staff sorted out some confusion over the phone with our booking before we arrived with competence and efficiency the lady we first met upon our arrival was the friendliest the guys we saw when entering the hotel during our stay were a bit subdued and didn t engage with us that well   The 1 bedroom apartment was more than we hoped for Nicely decorated on the top floor 3rd clean and spacious Nice to have air con in the double bedroom and both TVs were a good size Breakfast ok I personally prefer a traditional fry up when in a hotel but the choices were OK

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Breakfast was not extraordinary however it was acceptable   Very good and clean room Very important for us that rooms are clean and this hotel provide very well clean rooms We were 4 with a lot of luggage and we had good space Friendly personale

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Very Noisy waked up at apm when staff for breakfast come in Moisture on the ceiling of the bathroom quite expensive for the quality  Well located close to St Pancras and subway

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: not as in photos at all the owners own several hotels on the same street we ended up a good walk away up 3 flights of narrow and steep stairs despite asking for a disabled room for my mother they house homeless people and down and outs in the same building the rooms on this site are only in one building comprising of 5 rooms the chances of you getting what you think you are getting is extremely low it was vile there were mice dishes and cutlery still had stale food on them a cupboard fell on my head a double mattress on a single bed base still charged for a double the shower was rusty and had soap on the screen and the tiles one towel had a mysterious brown skid mark no plug for the sink dirty wall everything covered in dust hairs on all of the sheets and 4 of our pillows only one pillow per person no clean towels one in a dusty bag at the bottom of the wardrobe clearly not washed windows wouldn t open no vent for the shower so fire alarm went off though there was no alarm on our floor could hear it downstairs the staff came in and out of our room without knocking we couldn t lock the room to stop them from the inside windows were dirty and wouldn t open told to clean it all myself by extremely rude staff the owner said if the beds were made then he didn t care about the other issues smelled of cigarettes drunks lay in the street and filled the park outside go round the corner and find another place for a similar price there are a few and save the upset and distress we have had never ever been treated like such a degraded animal no thought even given to our children forced to stay in such a disgrace if we could ve we d have left as soon as we arrived   the ONLY postitive although don t let this sway you as there were several dozen hotels in the same streets was the location if you can manage noise all night long and a park right outside where the local drink drug collective is held 24 7

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Were in suite 1 on the ground floor next to breakfast room Was a bit of noise when people started going for breakfast but not too bad Matress on bed was very soft compared to most hotels I stay in Only 1 large towel provided for 2 of us No TV Remote in the room so couldn t use the TV   Good location only 3 minute walk from Kings Cross St Pancras station Nice to have table chairs mini kitchen and beds in the room

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Breakfast selection is limited but there are lots of restaurants around the area i e train stations   Quick and easy check in and out Beds are very comfy and lots of fluffy pillows Very clean rooms and felt safe sleeping at night Staff was friendly and very helpful Very close to St Pancras and King s Cross stations making it easy to travel in all underground lines airport lines and international train lines like Eurostar

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: The room smelt of damp and was next to the loo so very noisy There were no rooms to move to so I had to move to a single bed in other part of the room This wouldn t have been a problem except I d paid extra for the double bed   Location

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: We were told that someone would be on reception all night but when we got back to the hotel at 2 30 it took a lot of banging on the door and calling the hotel to get someone to let us in Maybe just unlucky as there was a guy there but just not at the desk Also the suite was nice and really clean but it was meant for 4 of us and would have been cramped if we had all been there   The guy on reception was really friendly and helpful we had a good laugh with him And the Hotel is literally just outside Kings Cross Station so great location if you are travelling to from there

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Firstly we arrived outside the hotel with 2 young children age 6 4 our youngest being austistic we were locked outside of the B B no one was at the reception and we were locked outside for over half hour no one answered the door or phone which made us increasingly upset as we didn t have anywhere to go and had to battle with our children and loads of baggage as they tried to run towards the road When someone finally arrived to let us in as apparently she was elsewhere at a sister hotel and left this accommodation un attended We were then put in the basement which was awful It was small and did not appear to have an adequate fire escape Our window handle was broken and led to a disgusting area which there was no way we could have escaped from the the even of fire and the fire door outside our room was also locked with a combination lock which we had no details for In addition the fridge in our room was filled with someone else s half eaten food which was disgusting and there was only 1 towel for all 4 of us in a family room to share when showing We tried to complain to 2 members of staff who said they could not help us and would get a manger to call us but until now they have now This hotel is a disgrace and should not be advertised on booking com When we complained they had the cheek to offer us 25 old our next stay with them As if we would ever stay in the hell hole again We would STRONGLY URGE anyone reading this to book ELESWHERE there are some lovely budget B B s in the area such as premier and some other guest houses on the same street DO NOT STAY in a place which treats its customers like animals Awful disgrace and will now be reported to trading standards   Absolutely nothing rude arrogant people who run a complete dive should be shut down

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: May something black the sewer not that comfort when have shower  Very nice and helpful staff amazing place with mini kitchen super close to kingcross station will come again next time

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Poor English both written email exchange and on the phone from receptionist made the booking process changing details due to booking on behalf of someone as a surprise very challenging All sorted in the end but took far too much time to overcome a simple issue Paid for breakfast but train too early and no alternative   A perfect location for an early morning Eurostar train Reasonable value in comparison to others in the area and a excellent suite on offer for 3 to 4 friends to stay

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: As reported to duty staff bedside lights bathroom mirror light and one other electrical item which I can t remember did not work Bedside light was important as I read while my my wife sleeps Friendly staff said this couldn t be fixed until next morning We were there for only the one night so this was disappointing Also there was very little room to move around to the far side of the bed approx 125mm between the corner of the bed and furniture Scenery from window was not pleasing   Staff were very friendly and helpful as best they could be Breakfast was good

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Because we were in Suite 2 on the ground floor the noise was HORRENDOUS We were in the right mind to go out and complaing but it was so late at night and we were tired In hindsight we should have   The rooms were super cosy and nicely finished my boyfriend is a surveyor and this is the first time we ve been to a hotel and he s not made a comment about the painting or other bloody finishings on the property

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: The after care I was charged twice for my stay and when I telephoned the comfort inn I was met with aggression I explained on which dates I was over charge and the gentleman Mr Haq told he could only see one payment he started shouting to me when I asked for him to check it again And I was told to send my statement to him These company s are quick to take your money but are slow to do anything for you I then spoke to booking com david who was more than pleasant but still I had to prove to booking com by sending my statement Which is all very well but again I am doing all the work I then spoke to my visa account people then were able to tell me I was being given a refund from comfort inn if Mr Haq had checked properly none of this would be necessary after 2 hours I finally got to the bottom of this My time is very precious to me Not pleased at all  Great location

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: We booked a double standard room and got a double suite confirmation thinking we had been upgraded On arrival were taken to double standard very small I said no to that and was then given the suite at no extra cost WoW sometimes you win

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Breakfast need little more Improvement such as more fruits and reparation of eggs Omlet bulls eye   Staff was really wonderful especially Ms Simona who was in the check in counter helped us a lot to settle in Spacious rooms Cleanliness was remarkable Beds were comfortable

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: I got stranded in London due to Eurostar cancellation after Brussels attacks and got lucky suites were 60 per cent off here and I got the last one a two bedroom suite for 71 pounds literally next to St Pancras Staff welcomed me and took very good care of me which was needed in the circumstances I ve put a instead of a D on price quality based on their normal prices because the price I got was definitely a D but it was 60 per cent off And then a instead of a D for the breakfast which wasn t bad at all but also not stellar perhaps a recent trip to France spoiled me for the croissants and baked goods But it was all decent and a good variety of things to choose from They were kind enough also to let me eat early due to early check in for extra securty checks The home I needed during two stressfull days I would definitely come again here with my family for leisure

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Our suite was right by the breakfast room so there was a lot of noise when breakfast started Our room shared a first door with something to do with the staff and they were banging the door from about 6 am As we were below ground level we could hear the underground until it finished and then again from early in the morning Check in is from 2pm and we arrived at 2 50 and they were still cleaning our room I had a business meeting at 3 30 and wanted to get changed but the cleaners were being awkward So in the end I had to just force my way in to use the bathroom to change We had paid 80 for 1 night and due to the brussels attacks we needed to stay another night When we asked at reception he was going to charge us 175 for an extra night We also asked for a quiet room I went online to find the room was 85 that night if I booked through booking com When we pointed that out he said he would do it for 145 So we checked out and went elsewhere It is a nice place with good location and big rooms but we got hardly any sleep due to noise If you stay here tell them you don t want Suite 1   Great location Very good big room Clean Breakfast was basic but OK

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: The bed was a little hard but that s just me my partner had a good night sleep   I liked that the double bed was private from the two singles we had Also the little kitchen area made it much easier and cheaper to have dinner before an huge holiday The staff were very helpful and it was so close to kings cross

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: It advertised a bathtub but they don t have them plus no heating in the bathroom but nothing else  The rooms were nice location fantastic I received what I wanted a cosy bed after a hectic day sightseeing and staff were really polite and friendly

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras
Full_Review: Continental breakfast was fab Comfy beds location perfect but remember which comfort in your staying at because our taxi driver dropped us off at the wrong one Theres 3 in the same area

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

Hotel_Name: Comfort Inn Suites Kings Cross St Pancras

The bathtub cleanliness wasn t inviting enough to enjoy this amenity The high speed WIFI was very spotty   The room included a smartphone to use international and domestic calls as well as unlimited data This was free of charge and helped me navigate the city and stay connected The staff was pleasant and accommodating The room view was fantastic and the room itself was spacious with two large windows

Nothing   The hotel was in a fantastic location and only a 5 minute walk to the nearest London Underground station The hotel itself was refreshing and a polished appearance which represented its 4 status The staff were extremely welcoming and happy which made the check in process that little bit easier During the stay they were also very attentive if needed and made for a comfortable stay The icing on the cake was the great price that was paid given the location 2mins from the Natural History Museum and South Kensington or 2 mins from Hyde Park

Barely enough space to walk between the bed and the desk and the shower was tiny   The hotel was clean and the staff were friendly Wifi was good too The water pressure in the shower was good too

Large room and nice facilities Nice area close to the metro Architectural design of the building gave it character Staff were friendly and very helpful

Rooms are well appointed and comfortable but it wasn t the cleanest Rooms were tidied up but not necessarily cleaned   Location is perfect Close to Gloucester and South Kensington tube stops Easy walk to the V A Science Museum Royal Albert Hall Hyde Park etc Boutique style hotel so very cozy Triples are spacious and well appointed Several wonderful restaurants nearby too
The room felt a little cramped and some breakfast items ran out and weren t replaced while we were there   The room was very nicely decorated and comfortable The staff very friendly and attentive

The water from the tap was yellow and smelt horrible The sink did not drain very well The room was extremely small for the price we paid in comparison to other 4 or 5 star hotels The overall first impression was not good The beds did not look crisp cushions seemed to have collapsed against the pillows It just didn t look perfect like other hotels we have stayed in of the same rating No free bottle of water provided in the room we have had this in numerous hotels previously Could buy from reception for 1 or the bar or mini bar for 2 50   The shower was very good The bed was comfortable The body lotion was good and smelt lovely

Booked a twin room for two nights first night not available given a temp double room that was tiny Moved to a twin room and this room was fantastic plenty of room and very comfortable so I forgave them   Location was great style cleanliness good bar food Breakfast had a great selection Two lifts which is unusual in a relatively small hotel and staff very helpful with suitcases etc

Disappointed when we saw our room as it was a family room two normal singles and two child singles We specifically chose the hotel to have three equal single beds for three adults as we booked a triple room which looked nicer in the pictures But we didn t get into our room until past 1am so just put up with it We were also lower ground so had no view we couldn t even see the weather to know what to wear the next day That said I was told the smaller bed was comfortable enough Disappointed we couldn t have an earlier check in time as requested which meant we had to go out without seeing our room until the early hours the next day after the concert   Comfortable beds Friendly courteous staff Breakfast was good plenty of choice Rooms were a nice temperature and bedding was good quality and cosy They looked after our luggage happily

N A  Superbly comfortable and quiet room and delicious breakfast with nice touches like fresh orange juice The hotel enjoys a brilliant location near Kensington Gardens Hyde Park and museums like the V A Science Museum and the Natural History Museum The friendly staff were keen to help and showed good attention to detail Would definitely stay there again

The room was at the back a room at the front of the hotel would have had a better view  The bed was enormous and very comfortable The breakfast was very tasty The staff were friendly and polite Nice part of London and walking distance to the Royal Albert Hall

could not find a better hotel convenient for both the Albert hall on a Sunday night and the London Museumns on a Monday morning turn left for the Albert Hall and righ for the Natural history 5 minute walk if you run in both directions ideal would not choose anywhere else

Hair in bed and in the bathroom Late breakfast start only at 7 00 no vegetable Thin walls between rooms Noisy AC   Perfect supply of stuff in the room bathrobe slippers tea coffee items in the bathroom complimentary water and chocolate Magazines and newspapers in the lobby Walking distance to Albert s Hall Hyde park and tube Next to Imperial college
The telly going of at 6oclock as someone had set the alarm before our stay There was a slight smell in the room that wasn t nice   The Staff were lovely
Nothing the hotel was too over priced for the small room you go 560 for two days   Nothing the hotel was too over priced for the small room you go 560 for two days

The staff were extremely helpful and welcoming The room was excellent standard double with great facilities in top condition including a comfortable bed The stay was brilliant and felt safe the entire time The location too is fantastic right near several national museums and the Royal Albert Hall I would readily book to stay again

The rooftop bar was closed for maintenance Shame as it was one of the reasons we chose this Hotel Also the shower seemed a touch small although this could be because we are both over 6ft   Due to availability we were upgraded to a Family room Just a little larger than normal but the extra space was a bonus The staff were very accommodating warm and polite An excellent room quiet and comfortable
Upgraded as fully booked Extremely spacious room Very quiet even though the room was downstairs and at front of property The bed was very comfortable Toiletries were lovely

When we arrived we were told we would not be able to check in until 2 00 So we left and returned right before 2 00 only to be told it would be a few more minutes The few more minutes turned into 1 5 hours that we could have been sightseeing We also had 5 00 dinner reservations to get ready for Not a happy camper here   Not much

the price for the breakfast was to expensive for the quality of the food fried eggs over cooked hash browns very greasy mushrooms dried out overall disappointing   location for the Royal Albert Hall was fantastic

Room could ve been better for the money I note that we got swapped to room 1011 as the couple who checked in just before us complained about the room Was a room with no view which is a shame Bathroom could ve been cleaner and sink plug was also broken Could also do with decor touch up as wallpaper peeling slightly   Staff were great accomodated every need Extremely helpful and well mannered Location was great right near to Royal Albert Hall so really convenient Beds were very comfy

Rooms may be small We asked for a larger one Staff was friendly   Breakfast buffet was varied and provided choice for all Location good for transportation restaurants and nearby sights Be prepared to walk a lot if you are set to explore London

Staff were very professional helpful efficient and friendly Food was very high quality Room was perfect comfortable bed and all facilities as described Breakfast was defiantly worth taking Perfect location for the Royal Albert Hall Close to South Kensington and Gloucester Road tube station Excellent stay
The property was central for the Royal Albert Hall Science Museum etc close but not too close to the underground Friendly staff Fluffy white towels and all the toiletries you could need

This was close to the smallest hotel room I was ever in The distance between the end of the bed and the wall was about 18 There was nowhere to put our luggage and we travel with only carryon A big suitcase would have been a show stopper But my biggest gripe is about the desk staff The first morning we only had one towel Eventually we found the other in the wardrobe The second morning there was only one towel and none in the wardrobe We told the desk about the problem and went out to breakfast Came back no towel Told them again and left for the day Finally after telling them a third time someone in housekeeping left a towel on the bed How hard is it to go and get an extra towel and hand it to the guest   We loved the location of this hotel It is in a residential area but very near tourist attractions such as museums has good tube access including access to Heathrow and has good restaurants in walking distance
No horel specific parking and I had not noted this when I booked so had to incur unplanned parking costs  Clean easy access to central London but also abut away from excessive traffic

The room was too small and I would have preferred to stay somewhere closer to a metro station because due to the distance we never used it Spent a lot on Uber s to get back from everything Also the bartender had a bad attitude and the food in bar was not good   The breakfast was very good good for walking to Victoria and Albert fine distance to bus

The service in the bar was slow and poor   Great location for Royal Albert Hall and Hyde Park and we had a lovely peaceful newly refurbished room at the back of the hotel with excellent bed and en suite Emil was also very helpful at check in and check out

The walls between some rooms are not very sound proof but not dramatically so The nearest Tube station is a ten to fifteen minutes walk away which might be a problem with heavy luggage   The hotel has an unbeatable location if you have a concert in the Royal Albert Hall to attend or just wish to explore South Kensington and Hyde Park and Kensington Gardens It is clean and comfortable and a very pretty old building of course refurbished and modernised
Room was very small for 2 people and a lot of luggage   Appointments were very nice loved the double shower Bed was stiff but bedding was high quality

Very creaky bed shower from room above leaked through to our bathroom Needs better attention to maintenance Surprised Wifi was not a secure network but at least it was free   Was expecting a lot more for a 4 star hotel and the price Bit run down needs refurb Breakfast buffet not as good as Premier Inn However great location
Rooms tiny bit small inc bathroom but we ll furshied everything you might want   Great Location staff pleasant all very easy Breakfast good book when there as cheaper
Bathroom too small Breakfast very very average Had to wait for food to be cooked buffet style Very small bed Housekeeping not very thorough  Bar staff were pleasant

The Room was the smallest Hotel Room I have every stayed in not at all like the sizes shown in Hotel literature The foot of the bed was so close to the wall that to get passed we had to turn sideways and slide through ducking to miss hitting head on the TV that is mounted on the wall at this point The Bathroom was minuscule with a stuck plug in the sink which I fixed but it then let Sewer smells into the Room unhygienic and dangerous the toilet roll holder was positioned under the sink and was broken The shower was so small that any movement inside it sprung the door open flooding the floor and also caused user to hit temp control changing temperature DANGEROUS When I reported the above it was met with indifference For the money this was a disgusting Ripoff Staying here spoilt our visit to London Will NEVER stay here again would Definitely NOT Recommend   Location
The first night we were in the smallest room I have ever seen We asked to move and we re accommodated with a much more comfortable room at the same price   The staff were great

We was fully satisfied with everything Location to the Royal Albert hall   The bed was amazingly comfortable and we were at the back of the hotel no view but have to say it was really quiet and peaceful

Not one thing  Booked hotel to visit RAH Excellent situated for this visit Everything about hotel excellent from checking in until check out with Vangelis Showed us to brilliant room spacious and very quite Special thanks to barman for excellent service Ate in hotel and fish and chips were very good praise indeed since I live up north

Breakfast satisfactory but unfortunately on a buffet service the food has to be kept hot and can deteriorate rubbery eggs However there was plenty of choice   Room recently renovated Spotlessly clean Nice bathroom with large shower cubicle Reception staff were particularly helpful to us

Was disappointed Reviews had been great but room very small for value Very low bed No bathroom counter Drains were slow sink drain broken and had terrible smell slimey No point saying anything as would have to move rooms Defeats purpose of settling in after very long travel day with lots of luggage for 5 weeks of travel This just should never happen Rooms should be top notch upon arrival with all expectations met Clean but not spotless   Location for Kensington excellent Staff helpful

There was nothing that I didn t like I would stay there again although there were several other hotels in the area which seemed to have good rates   The front desk was very helpful in obtaining a private driver to the airport This is a residential neighborhood with many restaurants nearby very classy neighborhood with a good vibe Close to the tube and the Victoria and Alert museum and museum of Natural History A mere 15 20 minute walk to Harrod s I did not decide to try the breakfast as it seemed more than I wanted to eat but I bought yogurt and fruit from a nearby grocery and kept it in the in room refrigerator I was given room 4 which is considered a club room which had 2 cozy bathrobes and slippers chocolates and bottled water although there was NO view When I returned I was in room 512 which was very adequate and had a window which opened giving a slight view of London Very satisfactory and quiet

The bathroom smelled moist Probably because the vent was not located above the shower The double beds consist of two single beds these will slide apart if you sit lay in the middle of them   Bathrooms were newly renovated the staff was very service minded and breakfast was nice although pricey The hotel is very central and about 10 minutes from the closest subway station Quiet neighborhood

Described in the profile as elegant stylish and recently refurbished we were deeply disappointed to find The Queens Gate was none of that There was a bit of surface prettiness but in general the rooms were somewhat shabby and scuffed with a strange odor when windows were open The rooms vary in size some with lots of space but too little room to put away small items Not a single drawer in the bedroom or bath We were adequately comfortable in our rooms but The Queen s Gate was too basic for our tastes A move was discussed but inertia and a full seven day schedule won out   Well situated on a lovely street in Kensington with easy access to Hyde Park the Underground and walks to the V A The front desk staff particularly Marta were available responsive and effective problem solvers Queen s Gate was well priced but we would have been happy to spend more in a hotel with higher standards and more comfortable amenities
The hot breakfast could have been fresh by order instead of sitting congealing eggs in particular under covers   Only ate breakfast there Was fairly good not excellent tho

On checkin we ended up in the third room that we were given since all rooms smelled of sewer gas The room we stayed in also had the odour as well as smoking smell from other guests although the hotel is supposed to be non smoking   The reservations manager was most kind in providing a small refund for our inconvenience and disappointment in our stay

I liked everything   Very friendly and accommodating staff Safe and secure Nice neighborhood Just a great experience Really cool feature was a local cell phone that we took with us all over the city and even to Cardiff for the day which was quite handy Also it s called a handy phone

Breakfast was a bit chaotic the food was very good but the layout meant that guests had little room for maneuvering around the various dishes It would be better against a longer wall or lose a couple of table rows and increase the areas of footfall around the food   We were upgraded to a Townhouse Room on arrival and because I told reception staff it was our wedding anniversary they sent up a desert for us to share very thoughtful There was a mobile phone in the room which was specifically for us to take around London with free wi fi calls to the UK and many worldwide There was a super coffee machine the bathroom was great shower very powerful room very quiet despite being at the front There is a lot of attention to detail in this hotel and the porter who brought our bags was very attentive he showed us all the facilities in the main bedroom and in the bathroom We would definitely stay here again

Why did the air conditioning come on automatically at 5am and wake us up   Location was excellent for Royal Albert Hall and convenient for Underground Service for bar meal was excellent as we needed to have a quick meal before going out

Nothing really The overall room size was a touch on the small size but that s not unusual in central London hotels unless you pay a fortune On balance reasonable value for money   Friendly reception staff very comfy and spacious bed Excellent location for museums and parks and the underground

The breakfasts were poor the main reason being the food was not hot and people were kept waiting for some items of food to arrive at the buffet on the first day all of the fried eggs were over cooked and were like rubber

Can t think of anything   Staff efficient and very helpful Bed was extremely comfortable Above all the location in relation to the Royal Albert Hall is the best we have found over the many years we have attended concerts there Our room was both spacious and quiet

Same as above   When I booked through booking com they had two prices for a room one with breakfast one without I took the one with breakfast When I got to the hotel I found out the breakfast was free with any booking but I was charged 40 a day for two people I would like to know where that 40 a day went

Corridors very dated Room was dated and needed painting Air con was broken First room smelt of chemicals Second room had a noisy generator outside Dried up breakfast  Good choice of breakfast although hot food was dried up Lobby area was very nice and modern also well kept Staff were helpful

I had booked a twin room for my mother and I On arrival quite late in the evening our twin room consisted of two single beds pushed together and made up as one double style bed I raised this with the receptionist on duty and asked if the beds could be separated which meant moving bedside tables lamps etc He looked in the room and abruptly told me that was a twin room he was not prepared to do anything about it as this was how twin rooms were in London and that I should look at the pictures on the website which displayed twin rooms as two single beds pushed together I informed him I had stayed in many twin rooms in London previously and this was not the case He again refused to do anything and left the room leaving us to try to separate then beds which was not possible due to the other bedroom furniture being secured in the way so I had to share the bed with my mum which was not what I had paid for or what we expected I checked the website and twin rooms are displayed as seperate beds I will not stay at this hotel again and if you want a twin room I would not stay at this hotel either
Room smelt of musk Room was tatty and grubby Drain smelt bad Room was so small you had to step over the corner of the bed to get to the other side of the room   Location

I lost 300 cash in this hotel I don t know who take this Is my first time lost money in the hotel Just a small advise When you check in just put cash and valuable things in the safety box If you don t The staff in the hotel will told you is your responsibility to put money in the safety box And they can do nothing if your cash or valuable things disappear   I lost 300 cash in this hotel And if you live in 102 room it will be noisy all the night
